race.description: Gerry Brown's Shelving & Storage Mdn Plate
race.comment: REGAL RINA (11) returned from a spell five weeks ago when she was beaten 4.5 lengths into fifth over 1200m at Gold Coast. This doesn't look as hard so she is a leading player. The well-related OFFSIDE (10) (half to G3 winner Red Card) is a three-year-old filly who is having her first run for the Lennie Wheeler yard. Finished off last campaign with an 11th at Kembla Grange six months ago. Ran fifth in a trial over 1050m at Deagon and looks well placed. Leading player expected to feature. LOPE BY NIGHT (3) has been out of the money of late including last time out when fifth over 1100m at Ipswich a month ago. In the mix on best. KICKSTART (2) hasn't produced much so far this campaign but should be nice and fit now and ready to show something.
